stages.native:
SELECT 
    date, 
    btc_avg_price, 
    eth_avg_price
FROM dbt_analytics_analytics.mart_market_daily
ORDER BY date DESC
LIMIT 14

SELECT 
    date, 
    news_count
FROM dbt_analytics_analytics.mart_market_daily
ORDER BY date DESC
LIMIT 14

SELECT 
    date,
    btc_avg_price AS "BTC ($)",
    eth_avg_price AS "ETH ($)",
    avg_price_change AS "Avg Change (%)",
    active_coins AS "Active Coins",
    news_count AS "News",
    avg_temperature AS "Temp (°C)"
FROM dbt_analytics_analytics.mart_market_daily
ORDER BY date DESC
LIMIT 14

SELECT 
    date,
    table_name AS "Table",
    record_id AS "Record",
    failed_checks AS "Failed Checks",
    auto_repaired AS "Auto Repaired"
FROM dbt_analytics_analytics.mart_dq_failures
ORDER BY date DESC
LIMIT 20

SELECT 
    price_usd AS "BTC Price ($)"
FROM crypto_prices
WHERE symbol = 'BTC'
ORDER BY timestamp DESC
LIMIT 1

SELECT 
    MAX(timestamp) AS "Last Binance Update"
FROM crypto_prices

SELECT 
    week,
    avg_btc_price AS "BTC ($)",
    avg_eth_price AS "ETH ($)",
    avg_market_change AS "Avg Change (%)",
    total_news AS "News",
    avg_temperature AS "Temp (°C)"
FROM dbt_analytics_analytics.mart_weekly_summary
ORDER BY week DESC

SELECT 
    date,
    news_count AS "News Count",
    btc_avg_price AS "BTC Price ($)",
    btc_daily_pct_change AS "BTC Daily Change (%)"
FROM dbt_analytics_analytics.mart_news_correlation
ORDER BY date DESC
LIMIT 30

SELECT 
    date,
    table_name AS "Table",
    failures_count AS "Failures",
    auto_repaired_count AS "Auto Repaired"
FROM dbt_analytics_analytics.mart_dq_trend
ORDER BY date DESC, table_name
LIMIT 30

SELECT 
    date,
    avg_temperature AS "Temperature (°C)",
    btc_avg_price AS "BTC Price ($)",
    btc_daily_pct_change AS "BTC Daily Change (%)"
FROM dbt_analytics_analytics.mart_weather_crypto_correlation
ORDER BY date DESC
LIMIT 30
